SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This Share Purchase Agreement ("Agreement") is made and entered into this 15th day of October, 2023, by and between:

Seller: Dr. Emily Tan, NRIC No. S1234567A, residing at 123 Orchard Road, #12-34, Singapore 678910, and reachable via email at emily.tan@fakesg.sg and phone number +65 9876 5432.

Purchaser: Mr. John Lim, NRIC No. S2345678B, residing at 456 Raffles Avenue, #56-78, Singapore 234567, and reachable via email at john.lim@fakesg.sg and phone number +65 9234 5678.

Company: Fictional Holdings Pte Ltd, UEN 198765432A, a company incorporated in Singapore with its registered office at 789 Cecil Street, #01-23, Singapore 123456.

WHEREAS, the Seller owns 1,000 ordinary shares in Fictional Holdings Pte Ltd, which he agrees to sell to the Purchaser for a total consideration of SGD 150,000 (Singapore Dollars One Hundred Fifty Thousand).

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.
